name: Pear and Roquefort Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. On a pastry board or in a large bowl, combine the flour and salt.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles small peas.
3. Make a well in the center and pour in half of the water. Toss and cut in with a knife.
4. Add additional water as needed until the dough holds together; do not overmix.
5. Form into a ball, wrap in plastic, and chill for at least 1 hour.
6. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Roll out the chilled dough to form 9-inch circles.
8. Arrange pear slices onto the prepared dough circles.
9. Fold up the edges of the dough around the pears.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
11. Sprinkle with frumbled blue cheese.
12. Continue baking at 400°F (200°C) for an additional 5 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven and serve hot.
